case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LEONARDO HUMBERTO PERCIRA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-27-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERCIRA, LEONARDO HUMBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEONARDO HUMBERTO PERCIRA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,195.34 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PERCIRA, LEONARDO HUMBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERCIRA, LEONARDO HUMBERTO $1,195.34 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,275.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
